title: Chocolate Bar
description: A little mod that adds a 🍫 to Minecraft.
body:
[![Join our Discord server.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.debuggy.gay) [![Requires Quilt Standard Libraries](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/requires/quilt-standard-libraries_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) ![No Fabric!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/unsupported/fabric_vector.svg) ![No Forge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg)

🍫 About Chocolate Bar

Chocolate Bar adds a new consumable to Minecraft that's basically a chocolate bar. It can be obtained by putting Cocoa Seeds, a Bucket of Milk, and some Sugar in a crafting table. As chocolate is a snack and not exactly very healthy to be eating anyways, it only heals 2 hunger points without giving any saturation and it has a chance of making you hyper as a side effect. There are a few easter eggs hidden inside Chocolate Bar; see if you can find them all.

🍫 Notes about Quilt

The Fabric jars will technically work on the Quilt modloader but it is unknown how long that will last. It is recommended to use v0.1.5 or higher since versions 0.1.5 and higher will be QuiltMC only.

🍫 Credits

  • Crackers0106 for original mod idea.
  • Ampflower, Crackers0106, Tubbo and others for helping me put this mod together.
  • Ampflower for an easter egg.
  • Crackers0106 for mod icon.
  • Tubbo for new chocolate bar textures.
  • LambdAurora for helping with datapack stuff.
